description: Search functionality, keyboard shortcuts, result navigation

tests.name: Search input accessible
steps: Find the search input element (#searchInput or similar)
Verify it accepts text input
Check it has placeholder text
tests.pass_criteria: Search input exists and is focusable

tests.name: Basic search - covenant
steps: Type 'covenant' into search input
Wait for results to appear
Verify results container shows matches
Count number of results (should be multiple)
tests.pass_criteria: Search results appear with multiple matches for 'covenant'

tests.name: Search result navigation
steps: With search results showing, click the first result
Verify navigation occurs (text view loads or chapter scrolls)
Check that the referenced passage is visible
tests.pass_criteria: Clicking result navigates to the referenced chapter/verse

tests.name: Clear search
steps: Clear the search input (select all + delete)
Verify search results container empties or hides
tests.pass_criteria: Results clear when search input is emptied

tests.name: No results search
steps: Type 'xyzzy999' into search input (gibberish)
Wait for search to process
Verify 'no results' message appears or empty state shown
tests.pass_criteria: No results shown, no JS errors

tests.name: Flow translation search
steps: Search for a known phrase from flow translations (e.g., 'In the beginning')
Verify flow translation matches appear in results

tests.name: Special character search
steps: Search with special characters: quotes, ampersand, etc.
Check console for errors
Verify app doesn't crash
tests.pass_criteria: No console errors, app remains stable

tests.name: Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+K
steps: Press Ctrl+K (or Cmd+K)
Verify search input receives focus
Check cursor is in search field
